license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v63e9gn
title: Measurement of insulin concentration
author: Kiichi Hirota

steps_raw.instruction: MIN6 cells were cultured for 30 min in Krebs-Ringer bicarbonate HEPES (KRBH) buffer (140 mM NaCl, 3.6 mM KCl, 0.5 mM NaH 2 PO 4 , 0.5 mM MgSO 4 , 1.5 mM CaCl 2 , 2 mM NaHCO 3 , 10 mM HEPES, and 0.1% bovine serum albumin) containing 2 mM glucose.
The buffer was then changed to another KRBH buffer solution containing the relevant experimental concentration of glucose, and the cells were cultured for 1 h.
The KRBH buffer was collected and its insulin concentration was measured.

The insulin concentration of the buffer was normalized to the total cell protein level. The results were normalized to the concentration of control samples of each independent experiment and the normalized values were shown as insulin secretion ratio.
